playbook.intent: A tight 15-minute ceremony where each contributor names yesterday's done, today's plan, and a real blocker; the PM exits with a refreshed blocker list and at most one parking-lot follow-up scheduled.
playbook.scope: A tight 15-minute ceremony where each contributor names yesterday's done, today's plan, and a real blocker; the PM exits with a refreshed blocker list and at most one parking-lot follow-up scheduled.

success-criteria.criterion: Pre-walk note exists before the standup
Zero solutioning happens in the standup itself
Refreshed blocker list published within 30 minutes

stage.name: Pre-walk the board
stage.intent: Walk the board before the standup so the meeting is fast.

tasks.task: Skim the board for items not moved in 2 days

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the pre-walk took under 5 minutes.

stage.name: Run the round

tasks.task: Cut status-only updates with a polite redirect

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the round finishes inside 12 minutes.

stage.name: Park, don't solve
stage.intent: Hold problem-solving out of the standup.

tasks.task: Drop solution discussions into the parking lot
Cap parking lot at the most urgent 1-2 items

stage.decision-gate: Advance when zero solutioning happened in the standup itself.

stage.name: Refresh blocker board

tasks.task: Post the refreshed blocker list to the team channel
Surface aging blockers (>2 days) to leadership

stage.decision-gate: Required: blocker list is published within 30 minutes of standup end.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content run-a-15-minute-daily-standup-that-surfaces-blockers-not-status --format md, agent: faion get-content run-a-15-minute-daily-standup-that-surfaces-blockers-not-status --format context, json: faion get-content run-a-15-minute-daily-standup-that-surfaces-blockers-not-status --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial v2 playbook drafted from F-059-063 chunk-04, role-manager-manager'}]
